context: The Italia '90 World Cup anthem 'Un'Estate italiana' by Bennato and Nannini became one of the most iconic sports songs ever written and dominated the year. Italian pop thrived alongside international dance and pop crossovers. Marco Masini, Amedeo Minghi, and Lucio Dalla represented the vibrant domestic scene while Madonna and Whitney Houston competed for chart supremacy.

tracks.title: I Can't Stand It
tracks.artist: Twenty 4 Seven feat. Captain Hollywood Project
